title: Iran links nuclear talks to MoU, asserts control over Hormuz

snapshot.title: Iran links nuclear talks to MoU, asserts control over Hormuz
snapshot.description: DUBAI: Iranian officials said Tuesday that implementation of key provisions of a recently agreed memorandum of understanding (MoU) must be completed before negotiations on Tehran’s nuclear program and the role of the International Atomic Energy Agency (IAEA) can begin. Iran’s ambassador to the United Nations, Amir Saeid Iravani, said five parts of the MoU still needed to be
snapshot.author: Arab News
snapshot.pageTitle: Iran links nuclear talks to MoU, asserts control over Hormuz | Arab News
